sourcePrompt: A ZIL-157 six-wheel cargo truck, the NVA supply hauler of the Ho Chi Minh Trail, about six and a half meters long. A rounded 1950s Soviet cab with bulbous fenders, a split flat windshield and a wide louvered grille; behind it a long wooden-sided cargo bed under canvas-topped bows. Three axles on big single tires - one forward, two at the rear - with a spare slung under the bed. Faded dark green, mud-worn and hard-used.
